name: AletheiaDB Memory Engine
description: Persistent temporal multi-model memory for AI agents. Hybrid vector + BM25 search, knowledge graphs, deterministic analytics, and fact supersession — in a single binary.

tools.name: search_memory
tools.description: Search memories with hybrid vector + lexical retrieval

tools.name: store_fact
tools.description: Store a new fact or observation in memory

kind.description: Memory kind: Fact, Conversation, Decision, Lesson, SessionSummary

tools.name: explore_graph
tools.description: Walk the knowledge graph from an entity to discover connected facts, entities, and topics

entity.description: Entity name or ID to start from

tools.name: get_usage_stats
tools.description: Get usage statistics for a cluster

days.description: Number of days to look back (default 30)

tools.name: get_memory
tools.description: Retrieve a specific memory by ID
